data.title: Degen Airdrop 2 Season 13: Claim Date Set for March 5th
data.description:
Degen: Airdrop 2 Season 13 Claim Date Set for March 5th

The Degen ecosystem has announced that the claim date for Airdrop 2 Season 13 is scheduled for March 5th. This news has sparked significant interest among the community, as airdrops often represent an opportunity for users to acquire additional tokens or assets at no cost.

In recent weeks, there have been several notable transactions involving large holders, or "whales," in the cryptocurrency market. On February 28th, five wallets that had been dormant for 2.5 years transferred a total of 5,842 ETH to the OKX exchange. This transaction is estimated to have generated a profit of approximately $2.33 million for the wallets' owners.

Two years ago, a whale that had accumulated 1,815 ETH completed its exit by selling off 2,375 ETH. This transaction suggests that the whale may have been taking profits or rebalancing its portfolio. Meanwhile, another whale has recently increased its holdings by 227,600 TRUMP tokens, with an average purchase price of $11.66.

Mirana Ventures, a venture capital firm, has also been actively building its position in the cryptocurrency market. The firm averaged a price of $2,134 to acquire a total of 21,667 ETH, amounting to a total investment of $46.25 million.

The upcoming Airdrop 2 Season 13 claim date has generated excitement and anticipation among the Degen community. As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, users and investors alike are keeping a close eye on the latest developments and opportunities.

data.title: Investors Reject Anti-DEI Proposals, Backing Apple, John Deere, Costco Initiatives
data.description:
Despite some companies potentially scaling back their diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) policies, investors continue to reject anti-DEI shareholder proposals. This trend was evident at apple, John deere, and Costco, where shareholders overwhelmingly voted down proposals submitted by conservative think tanks.

At Apple's annual meeting, 98% of shareholders voted against a proposal that sought to eliminate the company's dei initiatives. Similarly, at John Deere's meeting, 97% of shareholders rejected a proposal to end the company's diversity training programs. Costco shareholders also demonstrated their support for DEI, with 96% voting against a proposal to eliminate the company's diversity and inclusion initiatives.

These votes reflect a broader trend among investors, who increasingly view DEI as a critical factor in a company's long-term success. A study by McKinsey & Company found that ethnically diverse companies are 35% more likely to outperform their peers, while gender-diverse companies are 15% more likely to do the same. Additionally, a report by the Boston Consulting Group (BCG) found that companies with above-average diversity on their management teams reported innovation revenue that was 19 percentage points higher than that of companies with below-average leadership diversity.

Investors are also recognizing the importance of DEI in mitigating risks and enhancing a company's reputation. A diverse workforce can help companies better understand and serve their diverse customer base, while also fostering a more inclusive and innovative work environment. Moreover, companies with strong DEI practices are less likely to face reputational damage from discrimination-related controversies.

However, some companies have been facing pressure to roll back their DEI initiatives. Conservative groups have been pushing for the elimination of diversity training programs, arguing that they promote "critical race theory" and "woke" ideologies. Some companies have responded to this pressure by scaling back or eliminating their DEI programs, despite the evidence supporting the business benefits of diversity.

Investors, however, appear to be sending a clear message to companies: they value DEI initiatives and expect companies to maintain and strengthen their commitment to diversity, equity, and inclusion. As the votes at Apple, John Deere, and Costco demonstrate, shareholders are increasingly recognizing the importance of DEI in driving long-term business success and are willing to hold companies accountable for their DEI practices.

Trump Administration's HUD Cuts: A Blow to Housing Affordability
data.description:
The Trump administration's proposal to cut half of the federal workers at the Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD) has raised concerns among housing advocates and experts. The cuts, which target employees who support disaster recovery, rental subsidies, discrimination investigations, and first-time homebuyers, could significantly impact the agency's critical work. This article explores the potential consequences of these staffing cuts on the ongoing housing crisis and affordability issues.



The proposed cuts at HUD come at a time when the housing crisis is already severe. According to the National Low Income Housing Coalition, a full-time minimum-wage worker cannot afford a two-bedroom apartment at fair market rent anywhere in the United States. The loss of over 4,000 positions at HUD could exacerbate this issue by slowing down the distribution of funds and reducing the availability of crucial services.

One of the most affected areas would be disaster recovery. The Office of Community Planning and Development (CPD), which administers funds for repairing homes and infrastructure after natural disasters, is slated to lose 84% of its staff. This reduction could lead to significant delays in funding getting out to communities nationwide, as staff across HUD offices help communities navigate federal rules and plan, develop, and manage projects. For instance, after Hurricane Helene, CPD administered $1.65 billion to North Carolina for disaster recovery. With an 84% reduction in staff, the agency's ability to respond to future disasters and allocate funds effectively would be severely compromised.

Rental assistance is another critical area that could be impacted by the proposed cuts. The Office of Public and Indian Housing, which facilitates rental assistance subsidies for over 3.5 million households and supports public housing for roughly 1 million, could face a 50% reduction in staff. This cut could slow down payments for the Section 8 vouchers program, which provides rental assistance to millions of low-income people. With fewer staff, the agency may struggle to process and distribute rental assistance funds, potentially displacing tenants if landlords quit the voucher program due to any breach of contract.

First-time homebuyers could also be affected by the proposed cuts. The Office of Housing, which provides counseling for first-time homebuyers and mortgage insurance, could face a 44% cut in staff. This reduction could slow down opportunities for homeownership, as the office helps middle- and lower-income Americans qualify for home loans through the Federal Housing Administration (FHA). For example, in 2020, HUD's counseling programs helped over 1.2 million families with housing counseling services, including first-time homebuyer education. With a 44% reduction in staff, the agency's capacity to provide these crucial services would be significantly diminished.

In conclusion, the Trump administration's proposal to cut half of the federal workers at HUD could have severe consequences for the agency's ability to address the ongoing housing crisis, particularly in disaster recovery, rental assistance, and first-time homebuyer programs. These cuts could lead to delays in funding, reduced services, and increased housing instability for millions of Americans. As the housing crisis continues to deepen, it is crucial for the administration to reconsider these cuts and prioritize the needs of vulnerable communities.

As an investor, it is essential to stay informed about the potential impacts of policy changes on the housing market. By understanding the consequences of these proposed cuts, you can make more informed decisions about your investments and advocate for policies that support housing affordability and stability.

data.title: Vinfast Soars 4.38%: Asia's Safety Net Unlocks Potential
Troy Minerals Unveils Promising Drilling Results from Lake Owen Project, Wyoming
data.description:
Troy Minerals Inc. (CSE:TROY)(OTCQB:TROYF)(FSE:VJ3) has announced the completion of its maiden two-hole drilling program at the Lake Owen Project in Wyoming, revealing encouraging results that include the discovery of critical minerals such as scandium, a rare earth element (REE). The Lake Owen Project, located 50 km southwest of Laramie, Wyoming, is a Proterozoic layered mafic intrusion complex with a long history of sporadic exploration primarily for Platinum Group Elements (PGEs). The project is similar in style to the Stillwater Complex in the USA and the Merensky Reef of South Africa, making it a highly prospective North American-based target for significant vanadium, titanium, PGE, and associated metals mineralization.

The drilling program, which targeted titanium (TiO2) and vanadium (V2O5) mineralization associated with magnetite in gabbro, as well as potential reef-style PGE mineralization, yielded several anomalous zones of titanium (>1%) and elevated values of vanadium correlating with titanium enrichment. Additionally, the drilling results revealed elevated concentrations of scandium, a critical metal classified by the USGS as a rare earth element (REE) with no domestic supply in the United States. The high value of scandium, coupled with the total dependence on the metal from China and Russia, makes it a potentially high-value critical metal target for the Lake Owen Project.

The discovery of scandium at the Lake Owen Project, along with other critical minerals such as titanium and vanadium, presents an opportunity for troy Minerals to diversify its revenue streams and tap into high-demand markets. The global demand for these critical minerals continues to grow, driven by the increasing adoption of renewable energy sources and the need for advanced technologies. As the world accelerates its transition to renewable energy, the role of rare earth elements becomes increasingly pivotal, positioning the market for sustained growth.

Troy Minerals has recently expanded its total Claims footprint over the mafic layered intrusion at Lake Owen in Wyoming to 185 Claims, significantly increasing the project's potential scale and future exploration plans. The company is currently designing the 2nd Phase, summer 2025, exploration program, which is expected to build upon the encouraging results from the maiden drilling campaign. The capital requirements for the second phase exploration program have not been disclosed, but they will depend on the scope and scale of the planned exploration activities.

In conclusion, the discovery of critical minerals, particularly scandium, at Troy Minerals' Lake Owen Project has the potential to significantly impact the long-term valuation of the project by providing access to high-demand markets and diversifying revenue streams. The global demand for these critical minerals, driven by the increasing adoption of renewable energy sources and the need for advanced technologies, further enhances the potential market opportunities for these minerals at the Lake Owen Project. As the company continues to explore and develop the project, investors should closely monitor the progress and potential value creation at the Lake Owen Project.

data.title: CesurMining: Revolutionizing Bitcoin Accessibility for Beginners
data.description:
Cesur Mining, a leading cloud mining service platform, has announced its 2025 plan to make Bitcoin mining more accessible to beginners. The company aims to simplify the mining process, enabling users with minimal technical knowledge to start earning money through cryptocurrency mining.

The global cryptocurrency mining market is expanding rapidly, with a projected value of $8.24 billion by 2034. Cloud mining services are expected to account for more than 60% of the market share in the next decade, surpassing self-mining and remote hosting. CesurMining, with its user-friendly platform, is well-positioned to capitalize on this growth.

CesurMining offers a regulatory-compliant cloud mining site that provides a level playing field for all cryptocurrency miners. The platform allows users to make a deposit, choose a preferred contract, and have everything else handled automatically. Over $628 million worth of cryptocurrency has been mined through CesurMining, demonstrating its profitability as a passive investment.

Cesur Mining's automated services eliminate the need for professional knowledge and skills, making it easy for beginners to start earning money. The platform offers various types of mining contracts, ranging from $10 to $500,000, with profits beginning as early as 24 hours after investment. The initial capital can be withdrawn at the end of the contract or reinvested for higher returns.

Cesur Mining's reputation is built on its user-friendly platform, secure transactions, diverse mining contracts, and high daily returns. The platform offers free registration and new user rewards, an expert team and support, first-class fund security, and a generous affiliate program. CesurMining's commitment to sustainability and innovation ensures that it remains a leader in providing environmentally friendly mining processes.

CesurMining has opened up the cryptocurrency mining space, making it easily accessible to everyone, regardless of their location or initial investment. With a minimum investment of $10, users can start building their cryptocurrency portfolio from anywhere in the world. For more information about CesurMining, please visit: https://www.cesurmining.com.

data.title: Ethereum Whales Boost Holdings, Signaling Potential Rebound
data.description:
Ethereum, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency, has been experiencing a period of uncertainty, but recent developments suggest a potential rebound may be on the horizon. As big investors, known as "whales," increase their holdings, the market is showing signs of renewed confidence, with price swings becoming more stable.

Over the past 24 hours, Ethereum whales have been actively purchasing ETH in large quantities, with over $9 million worth of transactions taking place on decentralized exchanges. This increased buying activity from large investors indicates a growing interest in Ethereum, as they seek to capitalize on potential price gains. However, smaller investors appear to be more cautious, with only a modest increase in buying activity observed so far.

In the past week, Ethereum has seen a net inflow of 88,000 ETH, indicating that investors are holding onto their coins rather than selling them. This positive trend suggests that the market is regaining confidence in Ethereum's long-term prospects. However, short-term selling is still occurring, as traders take quick profits whenever prices rise slightly, keeping the market in a state of flux.

Ethereum's price volatility has been a significant concern in recent weeks, with swings reaching as high as 80%. However, this volatility has since decreased to around 15%, indicating a more stable market. This reduction in volatility often signals a calm before a significant price shift, and investors are reacting less to small price changes. While the direction of this potential price shift remains uncertain, Ethereum's history of bouncing back from market crashes suggests that a bullish comeback could be on the cards.

As Ethereum continues to show signs of recovery, analysts predict that the cryptocurrency could potentially surge by over 200% if it follows past patterns. However, external factors such as regulation and economic shifts will play a crucial role in determining Ethereum's future trajectory. Despite the uncertainty, Ethereum appears to be on the right track, and investors should remain vigilant and closely monitor the market for any further developments.

data.title: Palantir's Stock Plunge: A Cautionary Tale for Enthusiasts
data.description:
Palantir Technologies (PLTR) has been a darling of the stock market, with its shares soaring by over 1,700% since the start of 2023. However, the recent sell-off in the stock has sent its biggest fans to the exits, raising questions about the company's future prospects and the wisdom of investing in high-flying tech stocks.



The sell-off in Palantir's stock can be attributed to several factors, including the company's high valuation, market sentiment, and changes in shareholder composition. Palantir's valuation, standing at 46 times enterprise value to next twelve months revenue, is significantly higher than that of many of its peers in the software industry. This high valuation reflects the market's enthusiasm for the company's growth prospects and its unique position in the market. However, the recent decline in Palantir's stock price, which has seen a 15% drop year-to-date, has raised concerns among investors. The current multiples suggest that the momentum could be shifting, and the recent surge in insider selling may also be a cause for concern.



The recent surge in insider selling by Palantir's CEO Alex Karp and other executives, totaling over $2 billion and $600 million respectively, has also raised questions about the company's future prospects. This surge in insider selling might lead to increased skepticism among investors, as it could be interpreted as a sign that insiders are cashing out their shares while the stock price is high, potentially indicating a lack of confidence in the company's future performance.

The changes in Palantir's shareholder composition, with active institutional ownership rising to 32% since being added to the Nasdaq 100, could also alter the dynamics of the stock performance. This adaptation in ownership could diminish the previous premiums associated with retail investors, possibly reflecting a changing tide in market engagement.

The current macroeconomic landscape is also playing a crucial role in Palantir's stock performance. Analysts point to the normalization of market conditions following the extreme fluctuations seen during the pandemic. Negative influences like changing interest rates and AI market corrections could further compress Palantir's stock multiples, adding to the pressure already faced by the company.

Despite the recent sell-off, Palantir's stock remains highly valued, and its long-term prospects are still promising. The company's unique software solutions and strong government contracts may help it navigate the challenges it faces and maintain its long-term prospects. However, investors should be cautious and consider the potential risks associated with such a high valuation.

In conclusion, the recent sell-off in Palantir's stock serves as a cautionary tale for investors who may be tempted to chase high-flying tech stocks. While Palantir's long-term prospects remain promising, the company's high valuation and the recent surge in insider selling should give investors pause. As always, it is essential to do thorough research and consider the potential risks before making any investment decisions.

data.title: Tesla's Stock Dive: Ji Yue's Funding Hunt & Project Cuts
Amarc's Aurora and Emerging Copper-Gold Systems: A Strategic Opportunity in Collaboration with Freeport
data.description:
Amarc Resources Ltd. ("Amarc") has recently announced more drill results from the Aurora deposit and three emerging copper-gold systems at the Joy District, in collaboration with freeport-mcmoran Mineral Properties Canada Inc. ("Freeport"). These discoveries highlight Amarc's strategic focus on developing high-value copper-gold assets and its successful partnership with freeport. This article will explore the significance of these new findings and their impact on Amarc's long-term growth prospects.



The latest drill results from the Aurora deposit and the three emerging copper-gold systems at the Joy District have revealed promising mineralization, with high-grade intervals such as 130 meters of 2.40 g/t gold and 0.61% copper, and another of 192 meters containing 0.52 g/t gold and 0.25% copper. These grades, combined with the lateral and vertical continuity of the mineralization, make the Aurora deposit highly sought after by copper and gold producers. Moreover, the deposit is open to expansion in all horizontal directions and is near surface, which can lead to lower development costs and faster production timelines.



Amarc's collaboration with Freeport is strategically significant for the development of the Joy District. Freeport is fully funding work programs at JOY to earn an interest in the project, allowing Amarc to advance the exploration and development of the district without diluting its shareholders. This financial support enables Amarc to operate three core rigs simultaneously, aggressively drilling and systematically stepping out to outline and confirm the high-grade potential of the Cu-Au-Ag deposit. Freeport's expertise and experience in porphyry copper-gold deposits complement Amarc's team, which has a proven track record in BC and the Toodoggone region. Together, they aim to focus on discovery and make significant progress at JOY.

The Joy District hosts several important-scale sulphide mineralized systems clustered along several mineralized trends. The Aurora deposit is just one of these systems, and additional results from the 2024 drill program are expected to be forthcoming. Amarc's collaboration with Freeport increases the likelihood of further discoveries and the successful development of the district. The positive market sentiment for gold, copper, and silver, combined with Amarc's impressive new high-grade porphyry copper-gold-silver discovery, increases the attractiveness of Amarc as an investment opportunity.

In conclusion, Amarc's latest drill results from the Aurora deposit and three emerging copper-gold systems at the Joy District, in collaboration with Freeport, align with the company's investment philosophy focusing on fundamentals and long-term performance. The high grades, continuity, near-surface mineralization, and potential for further discoveries, combined with the strategic partnership with Freeport, position Amarc well for the future. As Amarc continues to explore and develop the highly prospective Joy District, investors should keep a close eye on this promising copper-gold play.

data.title: Bitcoin Plunges Below $79,000 Amidst Market Downturn
data.description:
Bitcoin's price has dropped below $79,000, marking a 24-hour loss of 8.64%. This significant decline comes amidst a broader market downturn, with the crypto market losing over $100 billion in value. The drop in Bitcoin's price has been accompanied by a decrease in trading volume, suggesting a lack of buyer interest at current levels.

The recent sell-off in Bitcoin can be attributed to several factors. Firstly, the U.S. pre-market plunge, which saw seven tech giants lose over $500 billion, has likely contributed to the overall risk-off sentiment in the market. Secondly, the fading of meme coins and the revival of decentralized finance (DeFi) projects have shifted investor focus away from Bitcoin. Lastly, the unloading of large positions by whales, or high-net-worth investors, may have exacerbated the selling pressure.

Despite the recent decline, some analysts remain optimistic about Bitcoin's long-term prospects. The average return on investment (ROI) for initial decentralized exchange (IDO) platforms has reached 400%, indicating strong demand for new projects in the crypto space. Additionally, the growing interest in DeFi projects suggests that the crypto market is evolving and adapting to changing investor preferences.

As the market continues to fluctuate, investors should remain vigilant and monitor the performance of various crypto assets. The recent decline in Bitcoin's price may present an opportunity for long-term investors to accumulate more coins at a lower cost. However, it is essential to conduct thorough research and consider the risks associated with investing in the volatile crypto market.

data.title: PCE Report Preview: Inflation Cooling, But Will It Be Enough for the Fed?
data.description:
The upcoming Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) report, scheduled for release on Friday, February 28, 2025, will be closely watched by investors and Federal Reserve officials. As the Fed’s preferred inflation gauge, this report provides critical insight into whether inflationary pressures continue to ease, which could influence future interest rate decisions.

Market Expectations

The report is expected to show moderate inflation and spending growth, with core PCE inflation remaining stable on a monthly basis but cooling slightly year-over-year. Here’s what economists are forecasting:

- Core PCE Price Index (MoM) (Jan): Expected to rise 0.3%, compared to 0.2% in the prior report, signaling a modest pickup in underlying inflation.

- Core PCE Price Index (YoY) (Jan): Forecast at 2.6%, down from 2.8% in the previous reading, marking the lowest annual increase since June 2024.

- Headline PCE Price Index (MoM) (Jan): Projected to rise 0.3%, unchanged from the prior month.

- Headline PCE Price Index (YoY) (Jan): Expected at 2.5%, slightly lower than 2.6% previously, reinforcing the disinflationary trend.

- Personal Income (MoM) (Jan): Forecast to increase 0.3%, a modest slowdown from 0.4% in the previous report.

- Personal Spending (MoM) (Jan): Expected to rise just 0.1%, a sharp deceleration from 0.7%, suggesting weaker consumer demand.

If these numbers align with expectations, they would support the view that inflation is continuing to ease toward the Fed’s 2% target, though at a gradual pace.

Why This Report Matters

After a hotter-than-expected Consumer Price Index (CPI) report earlier this month, which raised concerns about persistent inflation, this PCE report could offer reassurance that price pressures are indeed moderating.

A softer PCE print would help counter the fears sparked by the CPI report and could boost expectations for rate cuts later in 2025. However, with Treasury yields already declining in anticipation of a more dovish Fed, the market reaction may be muted unless the data significantly surprises in either direction.

Moreover, geopolitical risks and trade policies could complicate the inflation outlook. If President Trump’s proposed tariffs on imports from Mexico and Canada materialize, they could push inflation higher, making the Fed’s job even more challenging.

The December PCE report indicated that inflation was still on a downward trajectory, but progress was slow. Core PCE inflation had only modestly declined, and some Fed officials voiced concerns about the possibility of inflation becoming sticky above the 2% target.

If the January report follows this trend, it could reinforce the Fed’s cautious stance, delaying any immediate discussions about cutting rates.

Personal Spending and Consumer Behavior

One of the most important aspects of this report will be consumer spending, which is projected to increase by only 0.1%, down sharply from 0.7 in December.

A sharp drop in spending could suggest waning consumer confidence, especially given lingering concerns about higher borrowing costs and a weakening labor market. If confirmed, this could raise concerns about economic growth slowing too quickly and increase pressure on the Fed to ease policy sooner than expected.

Market Implications

A cooler-than-expected PCE report could reinforce the bond rally, with yields declining further as traders increase bets on rate cuts later this year. Stocks could also benefit, especially tech and rate-sensitive sectors, as expectations of looser monetary policy grow.

However, a stronger-than-expected inflation reading—especially if core PCE remains stubbornly high—could reverse the recent bond market rally and push stocks lower as investors adjust to the possibility of higher-for-longer interest rates.

Key Questions for the Fed

As policymakers analyze this report, they will focus on several key questions:

1. Is inflation continuing to decline, or are there signs of renewed price pressures?

2. How weak is consumer spending, and could it indicate an economic slowdown?

3. Could proposed tariffs push inflation higher, complicating future Fed decisions?

4. Are wage gains slowing, which could indicate lower future inflation but also softer economic growth?

Conclusion

The upcoming PCE report will be pivotal in shaping the narrative around inflation and Federal Reserve policy. While expectations suggest that inflation is cooling, markets will be watching for any unexpected surprises that could alter the trajectory of interest rates and financial conditions.

If the data aligns with expectations, it could reinforce the idea that inflation is trending toward 2%, but given the market’s recent rally in bonds and stocks, any positive impact may be muted unless the report significantly underperforms expectations.

The key takeaway: Investors should brace for potential volatility, as any deviation from forecasts could spark a meaningful reaction across asset classes.

data.title: Lanvin Group: Navigating Market Headwinds with Creative Renewal and Operational Agility
data.description:
In the dynamic and ever-evolving luxury landscape, lanvin group has demonstrated remarkable resilience and adaptability in the face of market headwinds. The Group's strategic realignment of creative direction and operations has positioned its brands for long-term growth and success. By prioritizing creative renewal and operational agility, lanvin Group has successfully navigated the challenges posed by a softening global luxury market.



The Group's revenue for the full-year 2024 was €328 million, a 23% decrease year-over-year versus 2023. Despite this decline, Lanvin Group has maintained operational stability and strong cost control through proactive strategic adjustments. The Group's gross profit margin remained steady at 57.5%, reflecting its resilience and potential for sustainable growth in a challenging environment.

Lanvin Group's strategic realignment has focused on several key initiatives:

1. Creative Renewal and Appointments: The Group has appointed new creative leaders for its brands, such as Peter Copping as Lanvin's Artistic Director and Regis Rimbert as Wolford's CEO. These appointments bring fresh perspectives and industry experience, driving innovation and reinvigorating the brands' creative visions.
2. Optimization of Retail Network and Store Footprint: Lanvin Group has proactively consolidated its store network, focusing on core business units and optimizing its retail footprint. This strategy enhances operational efficiency and ensures that the Group's brands maintain a strong presence in key markets.
3. Strengthening Global Operations and Market Presence: The establishment of a second headquarters in Europe, led by Executive President Andy Lew, underscores Lanvin Group's commitment to strengthening its global operations and market presence. This move supports the Group's expansion and optimizes decision-making efficiency.
4. Adaptation to Market Shifts: Lanvin Group has demonstrated varying degrees of resilience in the face of market shifts. Brands like St. John and Caruso have shown stability, while others like Lanvin and Sergio Rossi have embraced bold creative renewal to redefine their artistic visions and chart a course toward future growth.
5. Investment in Marketing and Product Development: Despite challenging market conditions, Lanvin Group remains committed to investing in marketing for upcoming campaigns and product development. This strategy ensures that the Group's brands continue to innovate and appeal to their target audiences.

By implementing these strategic initiatives, Lanvin Group is well-positioned to drive innovation and growth, ultimately securing long-term success in the luxury fashion industry. The Group's commitment to creative renewal and operational agility has enabled it to navigate market headwinds and maintain a strong presence in the dynamic and ever-evolving luxury landscape.

data.title: Ethereum Plunges Below Key Support, Millions at Risk
data.description:
Ethereum's price has been volatile in recent days, with the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization experiencing a significant drop. Following the $1.5 billion hack of crypto exchange Bybit, the crypto industry experienced a market correction that sent most cryptocurrencies below their key support levels. Bitcoin's price fell below the $90,000 mark for the first time since November, and Solana, one of the leading Altcoins of the cycle, dropped 30% in five days, hitting a five-month low.

Ethereum initially held relatively well compared to most cryptocurrencies despite accounting for $1.2 billion of the assets stolen in the hack. However, the "King of Altcoins" failed to sustain the $2,600 support after the market crash resumed on Monday. Crypto analyst Ali Martinez had previously warned that this level was key for cryptocurrency's bullish trend continuation, and failing to hold this support zone would send the price to the $2,400 mark.

After the drop, the analyst stated that the $2,425 level was Ethereum's next most critical support zone, as 10.33 million wallets accumulated 63.43 million ETH. However, the cryptocurrency failed to hold this level on Wednesday, dropping to $2,300 in the past 24 hours. Martinez warned that Ethereum needs to hold the $2,345 support level now, where 2 million investors bought 58.88 million ETH. If it falls below this level, the millions of investors will be in the red numbers.

Analyst Carl Runefelt also cautioned about ETH's current levels, suggesting that Ethereum risked dropping another 6%. The analyst advised investors to monitor the bearish flag forming in Ethereum's hourly chart for the past day, as it could send ETH's price near the $2,000 support line. If the cryptocurrency fails to hold the $2,320-$2,330 level, Ethereum's price targets a breakdown to $2,180.

Crypto analyst Ted Pillows highlighted ETH's bullish divergence in the 3-hour chart, suggesting that "a short-term rally towards $2,600-$2,700 looks possible

data.title: Xsolla & AppsFlyer: Revolutionizing Mobile Gaming Commerce
data.description:
Xsolla, a leading global video game commerce company, has partnered with AppsFlyer, a leader in mobile measurement, attribution, and data analytics, to launch custom integrations that boost mobile game web shop performance. The collaboration aims to provide game developers with improved insights and simplified activation for Xsolla's Web Shop solution, which is available worldwide.

The two companies have developed two custom integrations to address critical challenges in the mobile gaming market. These integrations offer comprehensive data on user behavior, campaign performance, and revenue attribution across both mobile and web platforms. The first integration, Mobile Application S2S Integration, enables complete LTV (Lifetime Value) and ROAS (Return on Advertising Spend) measurement for purchases made within the application and on the Web Shop. The Web Shop purchases are measured as in-app events, and AppsFlyer attributes each purchase to the number of mobile application installations, user acquisition, and re-engagement campaigns, providing a complete cross-platform user journey and overall ROI calculation.

The second integration, Web Integration Activation, is designed to measure and assess marketing performance, advertising conversion rates, high-performance advertising creatives, and re-targeting efforts for Web Shops using Xsolla's site builder. Developers can easily enable this functionality, allowing them to measure the effectiveness of ad campaigns driving traffic to their Web Shops through Xsolla's and AppsFlyer Publisher Accounts.

Berkeley Egenes, the Chief Marketing and Growth Officer of Xsolla, discussed how their Web Shop solution would revolutionize the mobile game development industry, with more than 500 Webshops established. Before this, traditional mobile measurement tools were not suitable for this scenario, and the integrations with AppsFlyer are bridging the gap between Web Shops and mobile apps, offering a complete view of LTV and overall ROI to game developers.

The Product Director of Gaming at AppsFlyer, Adam Smart, mentioned how in an increasingly evolving and dynamic gaming ecosystem, understanding the full user journey across mobile and web is critical for developers looking to optimize performance and maximize revenue. With Xsolla's expertise in commerce and AppsFlyer's leading analytics capabilities, the partnership intends to seamlessly integrate cross-platform measurement and attribution, giving developers the insights needed to drive smarter decisions and accelerate growth for the industry.

The integrations through this partnership address two major challenges in the mobile gaming ecosystem: reliable LTV and ROAS measurement across platforms and accurate Web

data.title: Trump's Davos Speech Sparks Crypto Market Volatility
data.description:
Market volatility has surged in recent days as investors brace for U.S. President Donald Trump's speech at the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland. The increased uncertainty has spilled over into the cryptocurrency market, with Bitcoin and other digital currencies experiencing significant price fluctuations.

The U.S. dollar has strengthened against major currencies, including the euro and the yen, as investors seek safe-haven assets ahead of Trump's speech. The strengthening dollar has put pressure on cryptocurrencies, which are often seen as riskier investments. Bitcoin, the world's largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, has fallen by more than 10% in the past week, while other cryptocurrencies such as Ethereum and Ripple have also experienced significant declines.

Analysts have attributed the recent volatility in the cryptocurrency market to a variety of factors, including regulatory uncertainty, geopolitical risks, and technical factors such as the upcoming Bitcoin halving event. However, the looming speech by President Trump has added an additional layer of uncertainty, as investors await clarity on the U.S. administration's stance on trade, fiscal policy, and other key issues.

Cryptocurrency enthusiasts have long argued that digital currencies offer a hedge against traditional financial assets, particularly in times of market stress. However, the recent volatility in the cryptocurrency market has called this narrative into question. Some analysts have suggested that cryptocurrencies may be more susceptible to market forces than previously thought, and that they may not provide the safe haven that investors are seeking.

Despite the recent volatility, some analysts remain optimistic about the long-term prospects for cryptocurrencies. They point to the growing adoption of blockchain technology, the increasing interest from institutional investors, and the potential for cryptocurrencies to disrupt traditional financial systems. However, they also acknowledge that the cryptocurrency market remains highly volatile and that investors should exercise caution when investing in digital currencies.

In conclusion, the recent volatility in the cryptocurrency market can be attributed to a variety of factors, including regulatory uncertainty, geopolitical risks, and the looming speech by President Trump. While some analysts remain optimistic about the long-term prospects for cryptocurrencies, investors should exercise caution and be prepared for significant price fluctuations in the near term. As the cryptocurrency market continues to evolve, investors will need to stay informed and adapt to the changing landscape in order to succeed.

data.title: UAE Leads Global RWA Tokenization Boom, Reaching $17 Billion
data.description:
The United Arab Emirates (UAE) has emerged as a global leader in real-world asset (RWA) tokenization, driven by proactive regulations that have fueled a boom in blockchain-based asset trading. As of February 3, cumulative onchain rwas reached an all-time high of $17 billion, positioning the sector as a key crypto investment narrative in 2025.

Industry players in the UAE have expressed strong demand for RWA tokenization, with real estate leading the adoption. Scott Thiel, founder and CEO of Tokinvest, a UAE-regulated RWA platform, noted that developers and large real-estate asset owners are exploring tokenization as an alternative means of financing or selling their properties. The booming property market in Dubai, in particular, has attracted significant interest in RWA tokenization.

On January 9, RWA blockchain firm Mantra signed a $1 billion deal to tokenize properties belonging to the Damac Group, one of the largest conglomerates in the UAE. Mantra received its license from the Virtual Asset Regulatory Authority (VARA) on February 19, allowing it to expand its operations into the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) region.

Rifad Mahasneh, CEO of OKX MENA, confirmed the significant growth in tokenization of real estate assets in the UAE. He attributed this trend to the evolving nature of real estate and the convergence of crypto and RWA industries. Mahasneh believes that RWA tokenization will diversify and expand to other industries, such as carbon credits and intellectual property.

The UAE's proactive approach to digital asset regulations has been crucial in driving the RWA tokenization boom. Thiel, who helped shape VARA's regulatory framework in 2022, noted that the UAE stands out for its clear guidelines on tokenized assets, de-risking many crypto activities in the region. The UAE's forward-thinking regulatory approach has allowed organizations to expand the use of RWAs.

Beyond regulation, the UAE and the wider MENA region have other advantages for the adoption of RWA tokenization. The region is rich in natural resources such as oil, gas, and minerals, and many of its population are digitally native, comfortable with technology and Web3. This curiosity and familiarity with technology are expected to lead to a rework of how markets across the region operate.

data.title: Zimmer Biomet to Present at the 27th Annual Barclays Healthcare Conference: A Strategic Opportunity for Growth
data.description:
Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE and SIX: ZBH), a global medical technology leader, has announced that members of its management team will be presenting at the 27th Annual barclays Healthcare Conference on Thursday, March 13, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. ET. This presentation provides an excellent opportunity for the company to showcase its innovative products, strategic initiatives, and financial performance to investors and analysts.



Zimmer Biomet's presentation comes on the heels of its fourth quarter and full-year 2024 earnings report, which demonstrated strong financial performance. The company reported fourth quarter net sales of $2.023 billion, an increase of 4.3% over the prior year period, and an increase of 4.9% on a constant currency basis. Full-year net sales were $7.679 billion, an increase of 3.8% over the prior year, and an increase of 4.8% on a constant currency basis. Diluted earnings per share were $1.20 for the fourth quarter and $4.43 for the full year, while adjusted diluted earnings per share were $2.31 and $8.00, respectively.



During the presentation, zimmer biomet is expected to highlight its recent acquisition of Paragon 28, a leading medical device company focused exclusively on the foot and ankle orthopedic segment. This acquisition is a strategic move that aligns with Zimmer Biomet's commitment to diversifying its portfolio outside of core orthopedics and investing in higher growth end-markets. The acquisition is expected to immediately accelerate Zimmer Biomet's revenue growth and be accretive to adjusted EPS within 24 months of deal close.

Zimmer Biomet is also likely to discuss its innovative product portfolio, including the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) Premarket Approval (PMA) for the Oxford® Cementless Partial Knee, the FDA 510(k) clearance for the OsseoFit™ Stemless Shoulder System, and the CE Mark Certification for the Persona® Revision Knee System. These products demonstrate the company's commitment to bringing innovative solutions to market that address areas of unmet need in the orthopedic segment.



In addition, Zimmer Biomet may provide an update on its financial guidance for the full year 2025, as well as its long-term growth prospects. The company's strong financial performance, combined with its strategic initiatives and innovative product portfolio, positions it well for continued growth and success in the medical technology sector.



In conclusion, Zimmer Biomet's presentation at the 27th Annual Barclays Healthcare Conference is an important opportunity for the company to showcase its strategic initiatives, innovative product portfolio, and strong financial performance. The presentation is expected to provide valuable insights into the company's growth prospects and its commitment to investing in higher growth end-markets. Investors and analysts should pay close attention to this presentation, as it may provide valuable information about the company's future direction and potential investment opportunities.

Word count: 598
